title: HTTYD Ultimate Modpack
body:
HTTYD Ultimate Modpack
Soar into the skies and dive into the immersive world of How to Train Your Dragon like never before! The HTTYD Ultimate Modpack brings the full Viking and dragon rider experience to Minecraft with hundreds of carefully selected mods designed for adventure, exploration, and epic fantasy gameplay.

Tame, train, and ride a massive variety of dragons, each with unique abilities, behaviors, and elemental powers. Build your own Berk-inspired village, explore vast biomes, conquer dungeons, and uncover hidden secrets in custom-generated worlds. With RPG progression, custom weapons, immersive visuals, and optimized performance, this modpack delivers the ultimate HTTYD adventure — whether you're flying solo or leading a tribe of fellow dragon riders.

Features include:

A full dragon training and riding system

Custom structures and villages inspired by the HTTYD universe

RPG mechanics: quests, skills, classes, and gear upgrades

Performance-enhancing mods to keep gameplay smooth and fast

Multiplayer-ready for your tribe of friends

Beautiful shaders, sounds, and ambient effects for full immersion

Whether you're a fan of the movies or just looking for a next-level fantasy modded experience, HTTYD Ultimate Modpack is your ticket to the skies.
